title: inula discoidea
intro: Inula discoidea, also known as the Alpine Inula or Yellow Chamomile, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which make it useful for treating various health issues. Its health benefits include soothing digestive problems, reducing fever, and calming respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Inula discoidea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
